top_signals.title: Alamos logs multiple high-grade hits at Island Gold
top_signals.summary: The exploration update “should be viewed as more important than the seismicity issues at Young-Davidson,” analyst says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US Senate passes housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030
top_signals.summary: The Senate voted 85-5 to pass a major housing affordability bill that includes a ban on the Federal Reserve making a central bank digital currency until 2030.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
